description_long: This is a square, dark wooden table with a rich, deep brown finish and a subtle, elegant gold trim inlay running along the perimeter of the tabletop. The tabletop appears thick and sturdy, with a smooth, polished surface that reflects a small amount of light. The table is supported by a single central pedestal that branches out into four curved legs, providing stability and a classic, refined look. The legs are slightly lighter in color at the base, suggesting either a different material or a decorative finish. The overall design is sophisticated and would fit well in upscale urban environments such as cafes, restaurants, or lobbies. There are no visible drawers, handles, or other interactive components beyond the main support structure.
description: A square, dark wood table with gold trim and a central pedestal base branching into four curved legs. The surface is smooth and polished, exuding a classic, elegant style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the square tabletop with gold trim and the central pedestal with four curved legs, one leg most prominent.
description_view_1: Opposite side view with similar features, but the leg arrangement appears slightly different due to the rotation.
description_view_2: Another side view, nearly identical to view 0, with the tabletop and gold trim clearly visible and the pedestal base centered.
description_view_3: Final rotated view, showing the tabletop and pedestal base from a slightly different angle, highlighting the symmetry of the legs.
attribute_number_of_legs: central pedestal with four curved legs
